title: lepidium foliosum var. fruticulosum
intro: Lepidium foliosum var. fruticulosum, also known as searocket or sea purslane, is a coastal plant species that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Lepidium foliosum var. fruticulosum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or salves, and is sometimes used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
